scenes.script: "Welcome to Module 1. Moving LLMs from a <mark>playground prototype</mark> or an experimental chat window into a <mark>secure, scalable production system</mark> requires systems engineering—not just clever prompting."

cues.label: BG: Server Room / Data Center
cues.prompt: Generate a cinematic dark tech background featuring a sleek server room or data center, purple and blue neon lighting, wide-angle perspective, depth of field, 1920x1080, suitable for video overlay

cues.label: Text: SYSTEMS ENGINEERING > CLEVER PROMPTING
cues.prompt: Create a modern, centered typography overlay with 'SYSTEMS ENGINEERING > CLEVER PROMPTING' in bold white sans-serif, slight purple glow, on dark transparent background

cues.label: Icons: Cloud Security, Shield
cues.prompt: Generate a set of minimalist flat icons: a cloud with a shield lock, keyhole, and security boundary lines. Style: neon cyan and purple, 64x64px, transparent PNG

edl: 0:00 - 0:03: Fade in background artifact with a slight zoom-in animation (Ken Burns).
0:03 - 0:05: Slide in Lower Third from left margin. Hold until end of scene.
0:05 - 0:07: Pop-in 'SYSTEMS ENGINEERING' text overlay. Match audio emphasis.
0:10: Trigger Shield and Security icons with a subtle glow pulse.

scenes.script: "Today, we are breaking down the official Claude Architecture Blueprint. We are moving beyond basic API calls to understand model topologies, stateless middleware boundaries, and how the <mark>Model Context Protocol</mark> changes enterprise integration forever."

cues.label: BG: Network Nodes / API Data Flow
cues.prompt: Design a futuristic technology background showing interconnected network nodes, API data flow visualization, enterprise system architecture diagram style, dark theme with blue cyan lighting, 1920x1080

cues.label: Text: MODEL CONTEXT PROTOCOL (MCP)
cues.prompt: Create a tech-styled text overlay for 'MODEL CONTEXT PROTOCOL (MCP)' with monospace font, circuit-board border, blue to purple gradient text glow

cues.label: Icons: Server Node, API Bridge
cues.prompt: Design an isometric server node icon with interconnected API bridge lines and data packets flowing. Modern flat vector style, dark theme, vibrant blue accents

edl: 0:12 - 0:15: Cross-dissolve transition from Scene 1 to Scene 2 background.
0:15 - 0:18: Replace Lower Third with 'Model Context Protocol' variant.
0:18 - 0:22: Overlay 'MCP' text center-screen. Background opacity drops to 30%.
0:23: Animate 'Data Pipe' icons moving from LLM to Database.

scenes.script: "All the code, blueprints, and architecture files we cover are live right here on our <mark>project hub</mark>."

cues.label: BG: IDE / GitHub Workspace
cues.prompt: Create a modern coding workspace background, dark mode IDE with code on screen, GitHub interface visible, soft monitor glow, minimal desk setup, cinematic depth of field, 1920x1080

cues.label: Text: github.com/rifaterdemsahin/...
cues.prompt: Generate a clickable URL pill overlay with 'github.com/rifaterdemsahin/...' in white monospace, on a semi-transparent black rounded rectangle, subtle hover glow effect

cues.label: Icons: GitHub Repository
cues.prompt: Create the GitHub Octocat logo icon, high contrast, white on dark transparent, minimal shadow for clarity on video

edl: 0:28: Focus camera on the browser dashboard recording.
0:35: Fade to black while speaker finishes the closing sentence.
